title: adinobotrys erianthus
intro: Adinobotrys erianthus is a plant species belonging to the family Cantharellaceae, commonly known as the 'witch's butter' due to its unusual appearance. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Adinobotrys erianthus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and combat infections. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as tinctures, teas, and salves, which are often used topically to treat skin conditions and promote overall health.
